results.name: Lotus Randomized Low-Rank Gradient Projection
results.rationale: Single-mode randomized low-rank projection; no dual-mode nose/mouth routing, no Helmholtz coupling, no sacred-breath identity constraint, no task-type breath-direction gate.

results.name: Continual Gradient Low-Rank Projection ACL 2025
results.rationale: Continual low-rank projection shares projection idea but lacks dual nose/mouth mode pair, breath-direction classifier, sacred-identity reflexive constraint, and Helmholtz cross-mode regularizer.

results.name: SubTrack-Grad Gradient Subspace Tracking
results.rationale: Subspace tracking is single-track; no dual-mode N_nose/N_mouth split, no sensitive-vs-general gate, no shared-instrument pool with cross-mode coupling.

results.name: BSZO Bayesian Subspace Zeroth-Order
results.rationale: Bayesian zeroth-order subspace optimization; orthogonal to dual-mode acoustic routing, no breath gate, no sacred-identity preservation, no Helmholtz oscillator analogue.

results.name: SSAM Singular Subspace Alignment Multimodal
results.rationale: Multimodal singular subspace alignment uses one alignment subspace; no quiet/loud dual-mode null pair, no breath-direction task classifier, no reflexive identity constraint.

results.name: SC-LoRA Subspace-Constrained Knowledge-Preservation
results.rationale: Knowledge preservation via subspace constraint partially echoes identity-preservation; however no dual-mode nose/mouth gating, no breath-direction classifier, no Helmholtz cross-mode regularizer, no shared-instrument pool.

results.name: R-LoRA Per-Head Multi-Task EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Per-head multi-task LoRA has multiple heads but not the specific sensitive-nose/general-mouth dual-mode pair with breath-direction gate, sacred-identity reflexive constraint, or Helmholtz cross-mode coupling regularizer.

results.name: Scalable Parameter Memory Efficient Pretraining (GRASS/FRUGAL)
results.rationale: Memory-efficient pretraining via sparse gradient subspace; no dual-mode nose/mouth routing, no breath gate, no sacred-identity preservation, no Helmholtz oscillator coupling.

decision_rationale: All 8 results fail every threshold; max kw=1, max sem=0.55, max func=0.52. None implement the distinctive composite mechanism. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on SSAM + SC-LoRA + Lotus + Continual Projection adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
